Built in Dingolfing, Germany

Clean Carfax – No Accidents

Offered is a 2003 BMW M5 (E39 chassis) finished in Carbon Black Metallic over brown leather. Carbon Black presents as deep metallic black in shade and reveals a rich blue hue in sunlight — one of the most desirable factory colors for the E39 M5.

This example shows 146,897 miles and carries a **clean Carfax with no accidents reported**. It has been meticulously maintained throughout its life with significant documented service history.

The **interior presents exceptionally well**, with clean leather, strong trim condition, and proper fit throughout. The **exterior paint and body also present very nicely**, showing consistent gloss and straight panels. This is a clean, well-kept car.

* * *

### Recent Maintenance (Last Five Years – $11,942)

*   Fuel pump

*   Motor mounts

*   Oil pan gasket

*   New rotors

*   Thermostat

*   Thermostat housing assembly

*   Front and rear control arms

*   Fan clutch

Oil service, filters, brake pads, and shocks have also been recently completed.

* * *

### Prior Documented Maintenance (Before Five Years – $27,678)

Major services include:

*   Rear differential reseal (2014)

*   B1 gasket seal

*   Suction and return power steering hoses (2018)

*   A/C and drive belts (2018)

*   Engine mount (2017)

*   Transmission mount (2017)

*   Ignition coil (2017)

*   Crankcase seal (2012)

*   Valve cover gasket (2012)

* * *

### Additional Upgrade

*   Supersprint exhaust system (not included in maintenance totals)

* * *

### Highlights

*   4.9L naturally aspirated S62 V8

*   6-speed manual transmission

*   Rear-wheel drive

*   Final production year of the E39 M5

*   Nearly $40,000 in documented maintenance

*   Clean Carfax – No accidents

*   Built in Dingolfing, Germany

This is a heavily maintained, mechanically sorted E39 M5 that combines analog BMW M performance with documented upkeep. It represents one of the most respected modern M cars ever produced.
